summary: Comprehensive testing of Sophie Lamour website major restructure completed successfully. All 14 requested features verified working: logo update, navigation restructure, services/techniques split, enhanced contact form with RGPD, admin dashboard contact display, CTA links to /contact, language toggle, and technique pages accessibility.

issues: Unicode escape sequence visible in 'Messages reçus' title showing as 'Messages re\u00e7us' - minor display issue

seed_data_creation: Test contact requests created during backend and frontend tests (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major site restructure verified. Key changes: 1) Logo is sophie_logo.jpg in header/footer, 2) Nav has Accueil|Qui suis-je?|Services dropdown|Blog|Contact (no Rendez-vous/Témoignages), 3) Services dropdown shows 4 services (personnel, professionnel, parentalité, home-organising) - NOT techniques, 4) Homepage has 'Mes outils & approches' section with 4 technique cards (Ikigaï, Yoga du Rire, Art-thérapie, Pleine conscience), 5) Contact form has firstName, lastName, email, phone, service checkboxes, message, RGPD consent, 6) All CTAs link to /contact, 7) Technique pages still accessible via direct URL (/services/ikigai, /services/art-therapie, /services/yoga-du-rire)

features_tested.navigation_structure: PASS - Accueil, Qui suis-je?, Services dropdown, Blog, Contact (no Rendez-vous, no Témoignages)
features_tested.services_dropdown_content: PASS - Shows 4 services (personnel, professionnel, parentalité, home-organising), NOT techniques
features_tested.homepage_techniques_section: PASS - 'Mes outils & approches' section with 4 technique cards (Ikigaï, Yoga du Rire, Art-thérapie, Pleine conscience)
features_tested.contact_form_new_fields: PASS - firstName, lastName, email, phone, service checkboxes, message, RGPD consent all present
features_tested.contact_form_submission: PASS - Form submits successfully with new fields
features_tested.admin_contact_display: PASS - Admin dashboard shows contact messages with firstName, lastName, interestedServices
features_tested.footer_logo: PASS - Footer has sophie_logo.jpg with light backdrop
features_tested.service_detail_cta: PASS - Service pages have CTAs linking to /contact (3 links found)
features_tested.favicon_svg: PASS - SVG favicon with botanical flower design present
features_tested.language_toggle: PASS - FR/EN toggle works on homepage
features_tested.technique_pages_accessible: PASS - /services/ikigai, /services/art-therapie, /services/yoga-du-rire all accessible via direct URL
